Calculates CRC32 checksums and provides a driver for MX25U flash memory with QSPI operations.


## Files
- **[flash_crc.c](flash_crc.c.md)**: Calculates CRC32 checksum for data in flash memory.
- **[mx25u.c](mx25u.c.md)**: Driver for MX25U flash memory, including initialization, reset, and read operations using QSPI.
